name: obviouslybusy
description: macOS menu bar app that turns on an ON AIR sign when you're on a Teams call
author: Today We Dream Tomorrow We Build

scripts.build: npm run build:native && npm run build:icons && electron-builder

extendInfo.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: ObviouslyBusy needs microphone access to detect when you're on a call.
extendInfo.NSCameraUsageDescription: ObviouslyBusy needs camera access to detect when your camera is active.
extendInfo.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: ObviouslyBusy uses Bluetooth to communicate with your Busy Buzz Light.
